creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yesterday I opened issue #144 upstream [1] to suggest changing the use of linux-c7 in the Makefile to linux-rl9 as soon as possible. 

Should we wait for such a commit? Or does our ports system behave reliably enough if we want to work with linux-rl9, but steam-utils actually wants to have all DEPS for linux-c7 (Makefile:l140-146)?


[1] https://github.com/shkhln/linuxulator-steam-utils/issues/144
